gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.molecule_id FROM bond AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.bond_type = '-' AND T2.label = '-' ORDER BY T2.molecule_id LIMIT 3
pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = '-' 
  AND b.bond_type = '-'
ORDER BY m.molecule_id
LIMIT 3;
question: Please list top three molecules that have single bonds between two atoms and are not carcinogenic in alphabetical order.
